title: 2025624 Drybulk
summary:
Main
• Capesize Spike Fades as Market Balance Loosens - The recent rally that pushed spot Capesize rates to the $30,000 mark is beginning to lose steam, with signs of weakness emerging in the Pacific market. Simultaneously, the previously overheated Atlantic basin is now experiencing an increase in vessel availability for July loading dates. These developments have long been anticipated by the freight futures market, which has notably not mirrored the surge in spot rates to the same extent.
